articles.title: Absurd AI attack ads facing scrutiny under Oregon election rules
articles.description: Political ads must disclose AI use when they contain “realistic but false” images of an individual “that a reasonable person would believe is real.”
articles.content:
The ads were not typical political fare.
In one, U.S. Rep. Janelle Bynum, the 5th District incumbent, appears with Gov. Tina Kotek in a bizarre scene: Both Democrats are dressed in black and Kotek’s eyes glow red as the two women run, breathless and ... [2369 chars]

articles.title: AI adoption helps Thai firms become digitally mature
articles.description: Thai businesses recorded a medium level of digital maturity for the first time as artificial intelligence (AI) adoption accelerates, according to the Thailand Digital Outlook 2026 survey.

articles.title: OpenAI Has Released Its Latest Series of AI Models, CEO Sam Altman Says That They Increase Efficiency By More Than 50%
articles.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said the company's latest flagship artificial intelligence model delivers a 54% improvement in token efficiency for agentic coding tasks.
articles.content: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said the company's latest flagship artificial intelligence model delivers a 54% improvement in token efficiency for agentic coding tasks, a gain that could significantly reduce costs for businesses deploying AI-powered software ... [2665 chars]

articles.title: Patreon is working with Cloudflare to squash AI crawlers.
articles.description:
In a post on Instagram, Patreon CEO Jack Conte says the move will prevent AI crawlers from training on creators’ work. Last year, Cloudflare began blocking AI crawlers by default and recently announced plans to give publishers more granular control of the kinds of scrapers they allow in.
[Link: Patreon Blocks Crawlers From Stealing Creators' Work for AI Training | https://www.404media.co/patreon-cloudflare-partnership-ai-crawlers/ | 404 Media]

articles.title: Instagram’s AI image generator alarms privacy experts
articles.description: Instagram users should check privacy settings after rollout of new Meta AI image generator, advocates warn
articles.content:
Meta has sparked blowback from privacy advocates for allowing its new AI image maker to generate photos of users with public profiles by default.

articles.title: Why Research Infrastructure Is A Strategic Priority For University Leaders
articles.description: Institutions that build research environments with scalable, secure AI and HPC infrastructure at their core are better positioned to compete and fulfill their mission.

articles.title: Column: AI can help dyslexic learners build career readiness
articles.description: AI is making education more accessible and personalized for dyslexic, at-risk and multilingual learners, Virginia Peninsula MOAA President Glenn Marshall writes in a guest column.
articles.content: Students with dyslexia often face major learning challenges. Traditional classrooms, with heavy reading and standard tests, can be especially difficult. But educational technology, especially artificial intelligence (AI), is creating new ways to impr... [4073 chars]

articles.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
articles.description: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.
articles.content: OpenAI is sunsetting Atlas, the AI-powered browser it launched in October with ChatGPT at its core. But it’s not giving up on the idea that AI should help people browse the web. Instead, it’s taking some of the agentic browsing features it tested in ... [1620 chars]

articles.title: The good, bad and ugly of AI’s economic impact
articles.description: Policymakers and investors ⁠fear artificial ​intelligence will induce ​a jobs apocalypse. Fortunately, neither theory ​nor evidence ​backs this up. The ‌technology ⁠has other more insidious macroeconomic effects, though. It ​could ​even ⁠reverse the secret of ​capitalism’s success.
